case_title: AETNA FINANCE CO, INC DBA ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS HART DANIEL L

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HART DANIEL L
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HART DANIEL L DISM WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLFT'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
